## ✨ What to Expect from PRP Facials

- **The Process:**

citations.cited_text: Your blood is drawn during the treatment, and the platelet-rich plasma is separated using a centrifuge. The injection of platelets stimulates growth f...
citations.title: PRP Facial Katy, TX - 4Ever Young Anti-aging Clinic and Medical Spa

content.text: Your blood is drawn during treatment, and the platelet-rich plasma is separated using a centrifuge. The injection of platelets then stimulates growth factor production, reducing inflammation, boosting collagen, and promoting skin healing.
- **Session Length:**

citations.cited_text: Sessions usually take 45–60 minutes, depending on the treatment area.
citations.title: PRP And PRF Treatments In Katy TX For Skin & Hair Health

content.text: Sessions usually take 45–60 minutes, depending on the treatment area.
- **Downtime:**

citations.cited_text: There’s little to no downtime. You may experience mild swelling or redness, which fades quickly.
citations.title: PRP And PRF Treatments In Katy TX For Skin & Hair Health

content.text: There's little to no downtime. You may experience mild swelling or redness, which fades quickly.
- **Results:**

citations.cited_text: Most patients see optimal results after 2–3 treatments spaced a few weeks apart. Both are made from your own blood, making them very safe. Improvement...
citations.title: PRP And PRF Treatments In Katy TX For Skin & Hair Health

content.text: Most patients see optimal results after 2–3 treatments spaced a few weeks apart. Both PRP and PRF are made from your own blood, making them very safe, and improvements typically appear within 3–4 weeks and continue to build.
- **Longevity:**

citations.cited_text: Lasting benefits – Unlike short-term treatments, our approach provides long-term results, with many patients enjoying the rejuvenating effects for sev...
citations.title: PRP Facial Katy, TX - 4Ever Young Anti-aging Clinic and Medical Spa

content.text: Unlike short-term treatments, this approach provides long-term results, with many patients enjoying the rejuvenating effects for several years.

## 📋 Pre-Treatment Tips

citations.cited_text: Stay hydrated to improve blood quality. Alcohol and caffeine should not be consumed for 24 hours before your session. Stop taking blood-thinning medic...
citations.title: PRP And PRF Treatments In Katy TX For Skin & Hair Health

content.text: Stay hydrated to improve blood quality, avoid alcohol and caffeine for 24 hours before your session, stop taking blood-thinning medications or supplements (if approved by your physician), and keep skin clean and avoid makeup for 24 hours.
